topics.name: 100–200 Level: Anatomy, Physiology, Nutrition & Foundation Nursing (EBSU)
topics.description: NUR 101 Anatomy & Physiology, NUR 111 Nutrition & Dietetics, NUR 201 Foundation of Nursing.

subtopics.name: NUR 101 & NUR 111: Human Anatomy, Physiology, and Nutrition at EBSU
objectives: Identify the anatomy and physiology of all major body systems relevant to nursing practice
Explain nutritional requirements across the life cycle and manage malnutrition in clinical settings

subtopics.name: NUR 201: Foundations of Nursing Practice and Ethics
objectives: Describe the history, philosophy, and scope of nursing as a profession in Nigeria
Apply the nursing process (assessment, diagnosis, planning, implementation, evaluation) to patient care

topics.name: 300 Level: Medical-Surgical Nursing, Pharmacology & Community Health
topics.description: NUR 301 Medical-Surgical Nursing, NUR 311 Pharmacology, NUR 321 Community Health Nursing.

subtopics.name: NUR 301 & NUR 311: Medical-Surgical Nursing and Pharmacology
objectives: Plan and implement nursing care for patients with common medical-surgical conditions in Ebonyi State hospitals
Calculate drug dosages, administer medications safely, and monitor for adverse effects

subtopics.name: NUR 321: Community Health Nursing and Primary Health Care
objectives: Apply primary health care principles to community nursing practice in rural Ebonyi communities
Plan immunisation outreach, maternal and child health (MCH) programmes, and health education sessions

topics.name: 400 Level: Midwifery, Mental Health Nursing, Leadership & Research Project
topics.description: NUR 401 Midwifery & Obs Nursing, NUR 411 Mental Health Nursing, NUR 421 Leadership, NUR 499 Project.

subtopics.name: NUR 401 & NUR 411: Midwifery and Mental Health Nursing
objectives: Provide skilled birth attendance, postnatal care, and newborn care in EBSU Teaching Hospital settings
Assess and manage patients with mental health disorders using therapeutic communication and psychosocial interventions

subtopics.name: NUR 499: EBSU Nursing Science Research Project
objectives: Conduct evidence-based nursing research addressing a clinical or community health problem in Ebonyi State
Present and defend research findings to qualify for NMCN licensure and EBSU BSc Nursing graduation
